action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Neubauer, Madison, Anderson, Arney, Bare, Clancy, DeSanto, DeSmidt, Fitzgerald, Hong, Joers, Mayadev, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Palmeri, Rivera-Wagner, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Stroud, Subeck, Taylor, Tenorio, Udell and Vining;
